description: apidocumentation.com serves Scalar website content about documentation, SDK, registry, API client, and MCP products. The pages on this domain point developers to Scalar-owned properties such as scalar.com, dashboard.scalar.com, and client.scalar.com rather than exposing separate APIs, GraphQL endpoints, MCP connect endpoints, or CLIs on apidocumentation.com itself.
summary: apidocumentation.com is a branded alias of Scalar’s marketing/docs site and does not expose a distinct public developer integration surface on this domain.
